title: When an item created on one board, duplicates as a subitem on my private board
excerpt: I need to create a board where all action items on the main board are duplicated on my private board as subitems under the tag name.  Is this possible? I need to track the projects and work done v. the main board only ha…

posts.author: bottola (Lisa Botto )
posts.cookedHtml: I need to create a board where all action items on the main board are duplicated on my private board as subitems under the tag name. Is this possible? I need to track the projects and work done v. the main board only has active items.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Lisa!

It isn’t currently possible to create a subitems through cross board automations. That being said, you could instead create the item in the destination board through an automation and then either manually convert the item into a subitem or set up an automation in the destination board to create the subitem based on a status change in the parent item… You would then need to delete that item.

I understand that this may not be the most ideal way forward, but hopefully either are workaround for the meantime
